disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sight-threatening red-eye danger signs — vision preserved (clears when wiped), no severe deep/aching eye pain, no photophobia, no halos, no ciliary flush; bilateral
trigger_question_examples: Is your vision actually reduced (even after wiping away the discharge), or is it just blurred by watering?
Any severe deep eye pain, strong light sensitivity, or halos around lights?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Vision's normal once I wipe, no deep pain, no light sensitivity and no halos — it's both eyes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Watery (not thick purulent) discharge, gritty sensation, preceding URI, follicular reaction and tender preauricular node — viral (not bacterial or allergic)
trigger_question_examples: Is the discharge watery (rather than thick yellow-green pus), and did it follow a cold/sore throat?
Is grittiness the main feeling, or intense itch (which suggests allergy)?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's watery, it came after a cold, and it feels gritty rather than intensely itchy.
